=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (10:29-14:2) TS377015: This expression contains chained `pipe` calls that can be simplified to a single `pipe` call. effect(unnecessaryPipeChain)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryPipeChain for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryPipeChain for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Rewrite as single pipe call"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryPipeChain for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryPipeChain for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Rewrite as single pipe call" ===

--- file:///.src/simpleEffect.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

export const simpleEffect = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map((x) => x + 1),
  Effect.map((x) => x.toString()),
  Effect.map((x) => x.length > 0)
)

export const nestedSimple = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.map(x => x + 1), Effect.map(x => x * 2), Effect.map(x => x.toString()), Effect.map(x => x.length > 0))

export const mixedCallsAndPipes = Effect.map(Effect.succeed(1), (x) => x + 1).pipe(
  Effect.map((x) => x * 2),
  Effect.map((x) => x.toString()),
  Effect.map((x) => x.length > 0)
)

export const twoDifferentPipingFlows = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.flatMap((x) => Effect.succeed(x + 1).pipe(Effect.map((x) => x * 2)))
)

export const traditionalPiping = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(1),
  Effect.map((x) => x * 2),
  Effect.map((x) => x.toString()),
  Effect.map((x) => x.length > 0)
)

export const usingConst = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map((x) => x * 2),
  Effect.asVoid
)

export const usingConst2 = Effect.asVoid(Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.map((x) => x * 2)))
